_comment: Regtest activation heights for each network upgrade.
Heights are spaced 150-200 blocks apart. This is tight because the
regtest halving interval is ~150 blocks, which rapidly reduces coinbase
rewards. Tighter spacing means more of each phase's coinbase is at the
higher reward level. See the 'Critical Constraint' section in the plan.
Each phase needs enough blocks for:
3. ~50 blocks for transaction operations and confirmations
4. Mining to the next activation height
BRANCH IDs are from the Zcash protocol specification, section 3.12:
